# FjordAnglers

> Guided fishing trips in Scandinavia — connecting passionate Central European anglers with expert local Nordic guides in Norway, Sweden, Iceland and Finland.

FjordAnglers is a curated guided fishing marketplace founded in 2026 by Polish anglers who travel to Nordic countries with a rod. We are not a travel agency or a generic listing platform — we build a brand around authentic, nature-first fishing experiences.

## What We Do

- Curate hand-picked guided fishing experiences in Norway, Sweden, Iceland and Finland
- Connect anglers from Central Europe with vetted local guides
- Specialise in salmon, sea trout, halibut, cod, pike and other Nordic species
- Offer transparent pricing with no hidden fees
- Provide booking support and trip planning advice

## Our Values

- **Care for nature** — we operate responsibly in the environments we fish
- **Authentic experience** — trips we would go on ourselves
- **Real talk** — no marketing BS, straight with the community

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://fjordanglers.com) — featured guides and experiences
- [All Trips](https://fjordanglers.com/trips) — browse all guided fishing experiences
- [All Guides](https://fjordanglers.com/guides) — meet our local Nordic fishing guides
- [Blog](https://fjordanglers.com/blog) — fishing tips, destination guides and species knowledge
- [Become a Guide](https://fjordanglers.com/guides/apply) — apply to list your guiding services

## Species We Cover

Atlantic Salmon, Sea Trout, Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout, Lake Trout, Arctic Char, Grayling, Pike, Perch, Zander, Cod, Pollock, Halibut, Ling, Brosme, Wolffish, Norway Redfish, Sea Bass, Mackerel, Spiny Dogfish

## Destinations

Norway (Lofoten, Tromsø, Gaula, Alta, Finnmark), Sweden (Mälaren, Vänern, Lapland), Iceland (Laxa í Kjos, Þingvallavatn), Finland (Lapland, Inari)

## Contact & Company

- Website: https://fjordanglers.com
- Social: @fjordanglers
- Legal: Fjordanglers, Otwarta 38b/11, Gdańsk, Poland (NIP 5833564870)

## Usage for AI

FjordAnglers content may be cited and referenced by AI systems. We request accurate attribution and that links to our pages are preserved. Content is factual information about fishing species, techniques, Nordic destinations and guided fishing services.
